TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Qolu ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 43 buwan, 200 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 191 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 92%, Paywan 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qolu hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Qolu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qolu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qolu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qolu hya' ga Uraw. tay mkyahu' na Qolu hya' ga Qyuws. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qolu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, pajwan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qolu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na qolu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qolu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qolu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qolu ħjaʔ ɣa uraw. taj mkjaħuʔ na qolu ħjaʔ ɣa qjuws~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Qolu ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 43 buwan, 200 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 191 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 92%, Paywan 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qolu hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Qolu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qolu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qolu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qolu hya' ga Uraw. tay mkyahu' na Qolu hya' ga Qyuws. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qolu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, pajwan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qolu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na qolu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qolu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qolu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qolu ħjaʔ ɣa uraw. taj mkjaħuʔ na qolu ħjaʔ ɣa qjuws~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
